description_long: This object is a boxy, retro-style fax machine with a stepped, tiered design. The uppermost section features a rectangular display screen, reminiscent of early computer monitors, set atop a midsection that houses a control panel with a large red button and two smaller indicator lights. The control panel is angled for easy access and visibility, and the main body extends forward to form a broad, flat surface, likely for document handling. The overall construction is solid and utilitarian, with sharp edges and a uniform light gray color. There are no visible numeric keypads or handsets, and the paper tray and output slot are integrated into the front-facing lower section.
description: A retro, boxy fax machine with a stepped design, angled control panel, and a prominent display screen. The exterior is solid light gray with minimal buttons and indicator lights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped profile, angled control panel, and the layered construction of the fax machine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the display screen, control panel with buttons and indicator lights, and the broad flat surface below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the stepped profile and angled control panel, with clear visibility of the machine's depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, solid back of the machine with no visible controls or openings.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front upper section, angled towards the user, and features a large red button on the left and two smaller indicator lights (one green, one red) on the right. The display screen is positioned above the control panel, centered on the topmost tier.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is integrated into the broad, flat lower section at the front, appearing as a recessed area for document placement. No adjustable guides or covers are visible.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is located at the front lower section, just below the control panel, with no visible guides or trays.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visible or attached to the object.
